title: nemacladus ramosissimus var. gracilis
intro: Nemacladus ramosissimus var. gracilis, also known as the California threadplant, is a rare, shrubby perennial plant native to California and Baja California. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Nemacladus ramosissimus var. gracilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
